title: podagrostis exserta
intro: Podagrostis exserta, also known as Sand Dropseed, is a type of grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Podagrostis exserta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
